creator: flo@kasimir.com
text:
On 2/18/10 9:13 PM, Tom Judge wrote:
> -----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
> Hash: SHA1
>
> Please see ports/144065 asterisk16 1.6.2.2
>
> TJ

Hi,

oh sorry i did not see that. I tested the patch from ports/144065 + this 
one. It seems to work fine, so when asterisk is updated to 1.6.2.x this 
patch can also be committed.

Thanks,
Florian

>
> Florian Smeets wrote:
>> Hi,
>>
>> AFAIK asterisk-addons and asterisk versions need to match except for the
>> digit(s) after the last dot of the version string.
>>
>> e.g. asterisk-addons-1.6.0.x needs asterisk 1.6.0.x ,
>> asterisk-addons-1.6.2.x needs asterisk-1.6.2.x.
>>
>> Therefor this patch has to wait at least till Maxim commits asterisk
>> 1.6.2.x to the ports tree. But i do not know how his plans are.
>>
>> I had a version of the addons for 1.6.1.x ready (ports/134112), but it's
>> still suspended as we are still using asterisk 1.6.0.x, which is
>> absolutely no problem for me!
>>
>> Nevertheless i tried your patch on a box with asterisk16-1.6.0.21
>> installed and it did not compile.
>>
>> So right now i cannot approve this request. Thanks for your interest,
>> though!
>>
>> Cheers,
>> Florian
>
